code:
import io
import string

fn print_count(_ d: Int, _ n: Int) -> Unit
  mut s = "#{d}: "
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    s = "#{s}#"
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(s)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut c0 = 0
    mut c1 = 0
    mut c2 = 0
    mut c3 = 0
    mut c4 = 0
    mut c5 = 0
    mut c6 = 0
    mut c7 = 0
    mut c8 = 0
    mut c9 = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        match b
        when 48
          c0 = c0 + 1
        when 49
          c1 = c1 + 1
        when 50
          c2 = c2 + 1
        when 51
          c3 = c3 + 1
        when 52
          c4 = c4 + 1
        when 53
          c5 = c5 + 1
        when 54
          c6 = c6 + 1
        when 55
          c7 = c7 + 1
        when 56
          c8 = c8 + 1
        when 57
          c9 = c9 + 1
        when _
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    print_count(0, c0)
    print_count(1, c1)
    print_count(2, c2)
    print_count(3, c3)
    print_count(4, c4)
    print_count(5, c5)
    print_count(6, c6)
    print_count(7, c7)
    print_count(8, c8)
    print_count(9, c9)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
